description: EvictionSpec is a specification of an Eviction.

target.description: EvictionTarget contains a reference to an object that should be evicted.

pod.description: EvictionPodReference contains enough information to locate the referenced pod inside the same namespace.

name.description: name of the target. This field is required.

uid.description: uid of the target. It can be found in .metadata.uid of the target and is a lowercase UUID in 8-4-4-4-12 format. This field is required.
